description: Mobile-first local business customer loyalty platform. Feature list subdivided surgically into 66 atomic, single-layer steps to guarantee error-free execution by small local LLMs.

features.name: db_migration_sales_transactions
features.title: PostgreSQL Migration for Sales Transactions Schema
features.description: Creates the raw PostgreSQL `sales_transactions` table in Supabase with primary key indexing and B-Tree index on `phone_number`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN querying the DB schema, the `sales_transactions` table SHALL exist with columns: id (uuid), phone_number (text), amount (numeric), and created_at (timestamp with time zone).
WHEN indexing metadata is fetched, a B-Tree index SHALL exist on the `phone_number` column.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/db_migration_sales.test.ts` SHALL assert schema existence and table column constraints.

features.name: model_sales_insert
features.title: Sales DB Model Write Layer
features.description: Implements the raw insertion DAO logic to write transaction records into Supabase in `src/backend/models/sales.model.ts`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN a transaction record is parsed, the model SHALL insert details (phone_number, amount) and return the created record.
IF the database returns a connection failure, THEN the insert method SHALL bubble up a descriptive database error code.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/model_sales_write.test.ts` SHALL cover successful insertions and exception states.

features.name: model_sales_query
features.title: Sales DB Model Read Layer
features.description: Implements transaction aggregation logic to count visits and average tickets per client in `src/backend/models/sales.model.ts`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN a phone number is queried, the model SHALL calculate cumulative transaction count and average ticket size.
IF no transactions are found for the phone number, THEN the model SHALL return zero counts and zero averages.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/model_sales_read.test.ts` SHALL assert aggregate calculation logic.

features.name: controller_sales_record
features.title: Sales Record HTTP Controller Action
features.description: Handles request parsing, input sanitization, and maps request bodies to model layers inside `src/backend/controllers/sales.controller.ts`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN processing input details, the controller SHALL validate phone format and verify amount is strictly positive.
IF amount is negative or phone format is invalid, THEN the controller SHALL immediately return a 400 validation error packet.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/controller_sales_record.test.ts` SHALL assert schema parameter checks.

features.name: api_sales_record_route
features.title: Sales Record API Route Pasamanos
features.description: Thin App Router API route `src/app/api/v1/sales/record/route.ts` mapping POST requests directly to the controller.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN a POST request is sent to `/api/v1/sales/record`, the route SHALL map the request parameters and return a 201 status with the JSON record.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/api_sales_record_route.test.ts` SHALL assert endpoint routing mapping and HTTP headers.

features.name: hook_cashier_sales
features.title: Cashier Sales State custom React Hook
features.description: Custom state hook `src/hooks/use-cashier-sales.hook.ts` orchestrating numeric form state, pending loading states, and API fetch executions.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN invoking the hook registration callback, the hook SHALL set busy loading indicators and trigger POST fetch operations.
IF registration finishes successfully, THEN the hook SHALL clear local form variables and set a temporary success banner state.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/hook_cashier_sales.test.ts` SHALL assert loading toggle states and form variable resets.

features.name: component_cashier_form
features.title: Cashier Transaction Input Form UI Component
features.description: Creates pure, tactile input form layout for phones, tablets, and desktop computers in `src/components/cashier/form.component.tsx`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN the cashier form is mounted, the component SHALL render numeric touchpads for mobile viewports alongside standard keyboard inputs.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/component_cashier_form.spec.ts` SHALL verify touch input renders correctly across small and large screens.

features.name: page_cashier_dashboard
features.title: Cashier Dashboard Page Route
features.description: App Router Page route `src/app/admin/cash/page.tsx` integrating the form layout component.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN accessing the cashier dashboard URL, the page SHALL verify server layouts and mount the cashier form layout within the global theme.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/page_cashier_dashboard.spec.ts` SHALL verify layout renders successfully.

features.name: test_e2e_cashier_sales_flow
features.title: Cashier Sales Registration E2E Tests
features.description: E2E Playwright tests verifying the end-to-end touchscreen cashier register workflows.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: Playwright tests in `tests/e2e/cashier_sales_flow.spec.ts` SHALL fill out mobile inputs, submit, assert form clear states, and check temporary success alert indicators.

features.name: service_traffic_distribution
features.title: Peak Hours and Daily Traffic Analytics Service
features.description: Pure backend calculations inside `src/backend/services/traffic.service.ts` analyzing transaction frequencies grouped by hours and weekdays.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: WHEN calculating metrics, the service SHALL compile transaction frequencies in 24 arrays for hours and 7 arrays for weekdays.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/service_traffic_distribution.test.ts` SHALL verify analytical correctness using mocked datasets.

features.name: controller_traffic_metrics
features.title: Traffic Metrics Analytics Controller Action
features.description: HTTP coordinator receiving metrics queries and return formatted payload outputs inside `src/backend/controllers/traffic.controller.ts`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: WHEN compiling metrics data, the controller SHALL invoke the distribution service and return top aggregates in clean JSON shapes.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/controller_traffic_metrics.test.ts` SHALL verify payload layouts and status codes.

features.name: api_traffic_metrics_route
features.title: Traffic Metrics API Route Pasamanos
features.description: Thin App Router API route `src/app/api/v1/sales/metrics/route.ts` mapping GET requests directly to the controller.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: WHEN a GET request is sent to `/api/v1/sales/metrics`, the route SHALL return a 200 JSON payload containing traffic peak maps.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/api_traffic_metrics_route.test.ts` SHALL assert endpoint routing response headers.

features.name: hook_manager_traffic
features.title: Manager Traffic Fetch React Hook
features.description: Custom state hook `src/hooks/use-traffic.hook.ts` orchestrating traffic analytics network requests and caching state.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: WHEN executed, the hook SHALL perform API fetching from metrics endpoints and keep loading indicators reactive.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/hook_manager_traffic.test.ts` SHALL mock responses and assert cache and status flags.

features.name: component_traffic_charts
features.title: Traffic Charts UI Presentation Component
features.description: Renders fluid charts displaying traffic peaks per hour and popular weekdays in `src/components/traffic/chart.component.tsx`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: WHEN rendered, the chart component SHALL present fluid visual bars representing busy/profitable periods.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/component_traffic_charts.spec.ts` SHALL verify component renders with mock parameters.

features.name: page_manager_reports
features.title: Manager Sales Reports Page Route
features.description: App Router Page route `src/app/admin/dashboard/page.tsx` integrating sales traffic charts.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: WHEN the page route loads, the dashboard layout SHALL render charts fluidly inside phone, tablet, and desktop views.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/page_manager_reports.spec.ts` SHALL verify layout CSS and component inclusions.

features.name: test_e2e_manager_reports_responsiveness
features.title: Manager Analytics Dashboard E2E Tests
features.description: E2E Playwright tests checking responsive viewport scaling and layout adaptations for analytics graphs.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.2: Manager views traffic and peak hours chart
acceptance: Playwright tests in `tests/e2e/manager_reports_responsiveness.spec.ts` SHALL assert charts fit nicely and don't clip on mobile viewports.

features.name: service_predictive_alerts
features.title: Predictive Traffic Analytics Engine
features.description: Computes historical week-over-week visit ratios in `src/backend/services/prediction.service.ts` to output alerts when data spans >30 days.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.3: Predictive week alert (if history > 30 days)
acceptance: WHILE data spans over 30 days, the service SHALL predict coming weekend shifts and return an alert projection object.
IF data spans under 30 days, THEN the service SHALL return an inactive status code.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/service_predictive_alerts.test.ts` SHALL assert active/inactive boundaries.

features.name: component_predictive_card
features.title: Dashboard Predictive Alert UI Card Component
features.description: Creates pure warning card layouts for the manager's phone dashboard in `src/components/dashboard/predictive-card.component.tsx`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.3: Predictive week alert (if history > 30 days)
acceptance: WHEN provided with a valid alert projection, the component SHALL render a card displaying the prediction text.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/component_predictive_card.spec.ts` SHALL verify card elements fit nicely on mobile screens.

features.name: test_integration_predictive_alerts_flow
features.title: Predictive Alerts Flow Integration Tests
features.description: Integration tests validating alert rendering states across both service metrics and component models.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.3: Predictive week alert (if history > 30 days)
acceptance: Integration tests in `tests/integration/predictive_alerts_flow.test.ts` SHALL verify no alerts are rendered when dataset lies under 30 days.

features.name: model_customer_segmentation
features.title: Customer Aggregation and Segmentation Model
features.description: Implements aggregate querying algorithms in `src/backend/models/client.model.ts` to cluster customer cohorts based on spending.
features.history: F2 - Story 2.1: Grouping customers into segments based on frequency & ticket
acceptance: WHEN clustering aggregate records, the model SHALL tag groups as 'inactive_30d', 'high_spender', or 'frequent'.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/model_customer_segmentation.test.ts` SHALL verify mathematical grouping thresholds.

features.history: F2 - Story 2.1: Grouping customers into segments based on frequency & ticket
acceptance: WHEN triggered, the controller SHALL coordinate client clustering and return parsed group profiles.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/controller_promotions_segments.test.ts` SHALL verify JSON shape structures.

acceptance: WHEN a GET request is sent, the route SHALL query active database customer clusters and return a 200 payload.

features.history: F2 - Story 2.2: Inactive 30 days prompt recovery draft using Gemini
acceptance: WHEN provided with item histories, the service SHALL return personalized copy limited to 180 characters.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/service_gemini_recovery_prompt.test.ts` SHALL mock LLM calls and verify limit enforcements.

features.title: Campaign Generation Controller Action

features.history: F2 - Story 2.2: Inactive 30 days prompt recovery draft using Gemini
acceptance: WHEN generating copies, the controller SHALL fetch target groups, invoke Gemini, and return compiled offers.
IF LLM limits are hit, THEN the controller SHALL inject a localized fallback discount message.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/controller_promotions_generate.test.ts` SHALL check error overrides and fallbacks.

features.title: Visit Milestone Evaluation Service
features.description: Verifies historical aggregates inside `src/backend/services/milestone.service.ts` to trigger alerts on a client's 10th visit.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: WHEN visit counts are evaluated, the service SHALL trigger active milestone flags exactly at the tenth accumulative log.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/service_visit_milestone_counter.test.ts` SHALL verify Boolean outputs.

features.name: controller_reward_claim
features.title: Milestone Reward Claim Controller Action
features.description: Handles reward validation and logs claim events in database schemas in `src/backend/controllers/milestone.controller.ts`.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: WHEN claims are triggered, the controller SHALL write logs recording claims and resetting milestone counters.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/controller_reward_claim.test.ts` SHALL verify claim logs.

features.name: api_reward_claim_route
features.title: Milestone Reward Claim API Route Pasamanos
features.description: Thin route wrapper `src/app/api/v1/rewards/claim/route.ts` mapping POST requests to the controller.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: WHEN a POST request is processed, the endpoint SHALL return a 200 status and write claim records.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/api_reward_claim_route.test.ts` SHALL assert routing maps.

features.name: hook_cashier_rewards
features.title: Cashier Rewards State React Hook
features.description: Custom state hook `src/hooks/use-rewards.hook.ts` fetching active milestone alert events and toggling modal screens.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: WHEN executed, the hook SHALL check active client milestone triggers and keep modal visibility flags reactive.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/hook_cashier_rewards.test.ts` SHALL assert state toggles.

features.name: component_cashier_milestone_modal
features.title: Cashier Milestone Reward Alert Modal UI Component
features.description: Renders prominent high-visibility warning overlays for cashiers on screen viewports in `src/components/cashier/milestone-modal.component.tsx`.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: WHEN triggered, the component SHALL render modal prompts displaying customer details, reward specifications, and action buttons.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/component_cashier_milestone_modal.spec.ts` SHALL verify structure.

features.name: page_cashier_dashboard_milestones
features.title: Cashier Dashboard Page Layout Extensions
features.description: Extends cashier route page layout inside `src/app/admin/cash/page.tsx` to mount milestone overlays.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: WHEN cashier pages mount, the layout SHALL monitor active milestone updates and render warning modals dynamically.
Playwright E2E tests in `tests/e2e/page_cashier_dashboard_milestones.spec.ts` SHALL verify modal inclusions.

features.name: test_e2e_cashier_rewards_modal_flow
features.title: Cashier Milestone Alert Modals E2E Tests
features.description: E2E Playwright tests checking milestone reward modal renders and confirmation click claim triggers.
features.history: F4 - Story 4.3: 10th visit reward visual alert
acceptance: Playwright tests in `tests/e2e/cashier_rewards_modal_flow.spec.ts` SHALL trigger 10th logins, assert modal visibility, and click claims.

features.name: util_logger_integration
features.title: Unified Backend Console Logger Utility
features.description: Simple clean wrapper utility inside `src/backend/utils/logger.utils.ts` to output formatted console tags.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN logging events, the utility SHALL write clean timestamp console entries.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/util_logger.test.ts` SHALL verify logger outputs.

features.name: db_supabase_client_instantiation
features.title: Secure Database Supabase Client Instantiation Model
features.description: Securely initializes the database adapter client and offline mock states in `src/backend/models/supabase.model.ts`.
features.history: F1 - Story 1.1: Cashier registers transaction
acceptance: WHEN the database helper is executed, it SHALL return instantiated Supabase adapter models.
Integration tests in `tests/integration/db_supabase_instantiation.test.ts` SHALL verify client objects.
